blocks.text: What model should I use for code generation tasks?

For code generation, here are the top options:

| Model | Provider | Strengths |
|-------|----------|-----------|
| Claude Sonnet | Anthropic | Best balance of speed and quality |
| GPT-4o | OpenAI | Strong at multi-file refactors |
| Gemini 2.5 Pro | Google | Excellent for large context windows |

You're currently using **Claude Sonnet**, which is a great default. You can switch models anytime from the model selector above.
